div.p: Each process has an 8KB kernel stack. PCB points to top. On user→kernel transition, CPU switches to this stack. TSS.ESP0 updated on every context switch.

ul.li: Each process gets its own 8KB kernel stack
Stack allocated via kmalloc() in process_create()
PCB's kernel_stack field stores the TOP address
TSS.ESP0 updated on EVERY context switch
Without correct ESP0, Ring 3→0 would corrupt stack
Stack overflow corrupts adjacent process's stack

ol.li: Pushes: SS, ESP, EFLAGS, CS, EIP
